requirement: Define the assay as a tumor-normal WGS HRD evidence candidate for research/validation use only
permitted_report_language: This assay candidate is under validation and is not ready for clinical interpretation.
prohibited_language: Clinically diagnostic HRD positive; PARP inhibitor eligible; treatment recommendation
evidence_dependency: Phase 3 WGS baseline plus HG008/COLO829 known-answer validation
caveat: Final clinical intended use requires laboratory director and clinical reviewer approval.

requirement: Limit reportable evidence classes to validated small variants allele-specific CNV/LOH SV signatures and integrated HRD features
permitted_report_language: Reportable range is not established; unsupported feature classes must be no-called.
prohibited_language: Genome-wide HRD score reported as validated; companion diagnostic equivalent
evidence_dependency: Known-answer fixture pass thresholds plus adapter validation
caveat: Reportable range cannot be locked from SEQC2 mechanics alone.

requirement: Require raw FASTQ or CRAM/BAM provenance identity read-pair integrity checksum or provider validation and expected sample pairing
current_policy: Phase 3 proves public FASTQ mechanics only
permitted_report_language: Raw-data QC must pass before interpretation is attempted.
prohibited_language: Proceed despite missing raw provenance or failed sample pairing
evidence_dependency: Validated raw input manifest and per-sample QC summary
caveat: Diana-specific raw-file inventory is outside this non-Diana clinicalization loop.

requirement: Require alignment reference compatibility duplicate/contamination policy BAM index validity and sufficient coverage
current_policy: Phase 3 proves representative BAM mechanics only
permitted_report_language: Alignment and coverage QC must pass before downstream feature interpretation.
prohibited_language: Interpret with failed BAM validation or reference-build mismatch
evidence_dependency: Known-answer WGS BAM QC and reference compatibility report
caveat: Exact coverage thresholds must be set from validation data.

requirement: Require validated tumor-normal small-variant calling precision recall normalization and filtering policy
current_policy: Small-variant WGS lane is mechanically passed but not clinically thresholded
permitted_report_language: Small-variant feature extraction is not clinically locked.
prohibited_language: Validated pathogenic small-variant result from this candidate pipeline
evidence_dependency: HG008 small-variant recall/precision fixture and SEQC2 baseline
caveat: Variant pathogenicity interpretation is a separate clinical curation process.

requirement: Require allele-specific CNV/LOH segments with purity ploidy and known-answer overlap
current_policy: Current coverage CNV bins are not allele-specific segments
permitted_report_language: CNV/LOH and scarHRD must be no-called until allele-specific segments are validated.
prohibited_language: scarHRD score or biallelic loss call from coverage bins alone
evidence_dependency: HG008 and COLO829 CNV/LOH fixtures plus primary CNV tool container
caveat: FACETS/ASCAT/PURPLE-style evidence is required before CNV scar interpretation.

requirement: Require validated production SV caller VCF/BEDPE with reciprocal-overlap performance
current_policy: Current SV evidence is BAM-derived counters not a production SV caller VCF
permitted_report_language: SV signatures and CHORD/HRDetect SV features must be no-called until SV caller validation passes.
prohibited_language: Validated SV signature or CHORD call from BAM evidence counters alone
evidence_dependency: HG008 and COLO829 SV reciprocal-overlap fixtures plus primary SV caller container
caveat: BAM-derived split/discordant counts are useful plumbing evidence but not a clinical SV feature set.

requirement: Require signature matrix QC mutation-count threshold reconstruction quality and known-answer controls
current_policy: Current SBS matrix lane exists but thresholds are not locked
permitted_report_language: Signature interpretation must be no-called when mutation count or reconstruction QC is below locked thresholds.
prohibited_language: Validated SBS3 or HRD signature call before threshold validation
evidence_dependency: SigProfiler adapter validation plus HG008/COLO829 signature guardrails
caveat: COLO829 is a UV/signature guardrail rather than HRD-positive truth.

requirement: Require explicit no-call language for every unsupported feature class
permitted_report_language: No call: required validated input or QC threshold is missing; no clinical conclusion should be drawn.
prohibited_language: Negative for HRD because feature was not assessed
caveat: No-call is not the same as negative.

requirement: Restrict positive/suggestive wording until validation and signoff are complete
permitted_report_language: Research candidate evidence only; clinical interpretation is not established.
prohibited_language: HRD positive; HRD deficient; clinically actionable
evidence_dependency: Known-answer validation plus locked thresholds plus reviewer signoff

requirement: Do not emit therapy eligibility or treatment recommendations from this pipeline
permitted_report_language: Treatment decisions require clinician-owned review and validated clinical assay context.
prohibited_language: Eligible for PARP inhibitor; recommend platinum; companion diagnostic result
evidence_dependency: Clinical review and external validated assay context
caveat: This pipeline may support evidence review but must not replace clinical decision-making.

requirement: Require laboratory director/clinical reviewer signoff before clinical reporting
permitted_report_language: Not signed off for clinical reporting.
evidence_dependency: CLIA/CAP validation packet and reviewer approval
caveat: Signoff is a hard gate independent of pipeline completion.
